DTS:Executable.DTS:refId: Package\SEQC - CODS Order contacts\SQL - Check Job Run Status (CODS|ORDER_CONTACTS)
DTS:Executable.DTS:TaskContact: Execute SQL Task; Microsoft Corporation; SQL Server 2016; © 2015 Microsoft Corporation; All Rights Reserved;http://www.microsoft.com/sql/support/default.asp;1

SQLTask:SqlTaskData.SQLTask:SqlStatementSource: SELECT MAX(job_complete) job_complete FROM ( SELECT 'Y' job_complete FROM dbo.job_validation_completion_check jvcc WHERE jvcc.job_name = ? AND CAST(jvcc.run_date AS DATE) = CAST(getdate() AS DATE) UNION SELECT 'N' job_complete) dataQ

End="-1117.57142857143,195.5"> <mssgle:Curve.Segments> <mssgle:SegmentCollection Capacity="5"> <mssgle:LineSegment End="0,149.77183833116" /> <mssgle:CubicBezierSegment Point1="0,149.77183833116" Point2="0,153.77183833116" Point3="-4,153.77183833116" /> <mssgle:LineSegment End="-1113.57142857143,153.77183833116" /> <mssgle:CubicBezierSegment Point1="-1113.57142857143,153.77183833116" Point2="-1117.57142857143,153.77183833116" Point3="-1117.57142857143,157.77183833116" /> <mssgle:LineSegment End="-1117.57142857143,195.5" /> </mssgle:SegmentCollection> </mssgle:Curve.Segments> </mssgle:Curve> </EdgeLayout.Curve> <EdgeLayout.Labels> <EdgeLabelCollection /> </EdgeLayout.Labels> </EdgeLayout> <AnnotationLayout Text="Author: Chad Tjelmeland
Create date: 04/27/2021
Justification: This will be the master package for the cods processes that have progressed into 
 an incremental load status. THere is a dependency for a pseudo job set up that should 
 hold this process until CODS Is available from the DSL_SD and VPROV processes. Once
 one of those is available it will log cods ready.

 Each container will have its own derived value that is the "daily check" that goes into
 a standalone table dbo.job_validation_completion_check if you need to re-run something that 
 previously ran for the day you will need to delete that days entry from that table only.

 delete from dbo.job_validation_completion_check WHERE job_name = <> AND run_date = CAST(getdate() AS DATE);

 NOTE: If you need to execute this master package interactively, verify
 the value of the vDTSXPath variable matches the path your TFS
 Local Path is mapped to. Otherwise, the child packages will not
 be found.

 On the SSIS Server, the value of the vDTSXPath variable is set at
 run-time via the calling SQL Server Agent job. So it is not necessary
 to reset this variable ahead of deployment." ParentId="Package" Size="732,328" Id="77f38529-950f-4ece-b9ac-754c1551ee41" TopLeft="1152,721.5"> <AnnotationLayout.FontInfo> <mssge:FontInfo Family="Tahoma" Size="12" Color="#FF0000FF"> <mssge:FontInfo.TextDecorations> <av:TextDecorationCollection /> </mssge:FontInfo.TextDecorations> </mssge:FontInfo> </AnnotationLayout.FontInfo> </AnnotationLayout> <AnnotationLayout Text="To Reprocess Job 2nd Time in a day
DELETE FROM dbo.job_validation_completion_check 
WHERE job_name = '<<JOBNAME>>'
AND run_date = CAST(getdate() AS DATE);
" ParentId="Package" FontInfo="{assembly:Null}" Size="308,104" Id="e806d937-ebd5-4cd2-a1fb-907d31f9feea" TopLeft="1945,831.5" /> </GraphLayout> </LayoutInfo> </Package> <DtsEventHandler design-time-name="Package.EventHandlers[OnError]"> <LayoutInfo> <GraphLayout Capacity="4" xmlns="clr-namespace:Microsoft.SqlServer.IntegrationServices.Designer.Model.Serialization;assembly=Microsoft.SqlServer.IntegrationServices.Graph"> <NodeLayout Size="186,42" Id="Package.EventHandlers[OnError]\SQL - Log Job Failure" TopLeft="5.5,5.5" /> </GraphLayout> </LayoutInfo> </DtsEventHandler> <PrecedenceConstraint design-time-name="Package\SEQC - CODS Order contacts.PrecedenceConstraints[Constraint 1]"> <ShowAnnotation>ConstraintOptions</ShowAnnotation> </PrecedenceConstraint> <PrecedenceConstraint design-time-name="Package\SEQC - CODS Customer.PrecedenceConstraints[Constraint 1]"> <ShowAnnotation>ConstraintOptions</ShowAnnotation> </PrecedenceConstraint> <PrecedenceConstraint design-time-name="Package\SEQC - CODS Customer Orders.PrecedenceConstraints[Constraint 1]"> <ShowAnnotation>ConstraintOptions</ShowAnnotation> </PrecedenceConstraint> <PrecedenceConstraint design-time-name="Package\SEQC - CODS Order Account Team.PrecedenceConstraints[Constraint 1]"> <ShowAnnotation>ConstraintOptions</ShowAnnotation> </PrecedenceConstraint> <PrecedenceConstraint design-time-name="Package\SEQC - CODS Quote Product.PrecedenceConstraints[Constraint 1]"> <ShowAnnotation>ConstraintOptions</ShowAnnotation> </PrecedenceConstraint> <PrecedenceConstraint design-time-name="Package\SEQC - CODS Quote QProduct.PrecedenceConstraints[Constraint 1]"> <ShowAnnotation>ConstraintOptions</ShowAnnotation> </PrecedenceConstraint> </Objects>
